message:
⚡ Add in-memory caching for operators and switch to -o json (#981)

Cache CSV query results per-cluster with 5-minute TTL so that
re-navigating to the Operators page is instant instead of waiting
60+ seconds for kubectl to re-query large OLM clusters.

Switch from -o jsonpath to -o json for operator queries — jsonpath
rendering is the bottleneck on clusters with 1000+ CSVs (98-180s
vs ~40s for raw JSON).

Results:
- First load: ~60s progressive (4 non-OLM clusters instant, 3 OLM
  clusters stream in over 40-60s)
- Cached re-navigation: instant (<1s for all 5,215 operators)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
